elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65, ระดับหลังเสาล่าง +6.95, ระดับหลังเสาบน +7.85. Height sub-chain: 0.60(ref-floor1) + 3.15(floor1-floor2) + 2.90(floor2-roof beam) = 6.65; roof structure continues 0.30(roof beam-หลังเสาล่าง) + 0.90(หลังเสาล่าง-หลังเสาบน, ridge post) to +7.85.

elements.description: 'ST1 A-19 ม้านั่ง คสล ดูแบบขยาย' callout near เฉลียง at ground level — this resolves (with medium-high confidence) the earlier ambiguous tag flagged on the ground floor plan (หน้า06, element 'wall_or_stair_callout_bottom_right') as most likely reading 'ST1/A-19', not 'ST3/A-19' — the callout here explicitly reads ST1 and A-19 together with 'ม้านั่ง คสล' (concrete bench/step)

elements.description: Cross-hatched stair flight visible between พักผ่อน and ทานอาหาร, rising from ground floor toward the 2nd floor — same main staircase seen in รูปตัด 1 (หน้า13)

elements.description: Bottom dimension chain (under grid letters A,B,C,D,E): 1.50 | 3.50 | 2.20 | 2.70 | 1.50, bracket 10.00 (A-E) plus a further 2.00 bracket past gridE — the printed 1.50 segment past gridE and the 2.00 total bracket do not fully individually reconcile at this resolution (a further ~0.50m sub-split beyond the 1.50 line is implied but not separately dimensioned)

warnings: This building cross-section (รูปตัด 2) cuts along the depth direction (parallel to gridE/D/C/B/A), through the ระเบียง/นอน1/นอน2 sequence upstairs and เฉลียง/พักผ่อน/(stair)/ทานอาหาร sequence downstairs — grid letters A-B-C-D-E run left to right on this sheet (same orientation as รูปด้าน 4, A-10).
Sibling section รูปตัด 3 is in _หน้า15_section3.json (not yet read at time of writing this file); รูปตัด 1 is _หน้า13_section1.json.

This section provides the clearest available evidence toward resolving the ground-floor plan's (หน้า06) flagged ST2-vs-ST3/A-19-vs-other-digit stair-callout ambiguities: it explicitly shows 'ST1 A-19' near เฉลียง (a concrete bench/step detail, ม้านั่ง คสล), separate from the main switchback staircase (which is the cross-hatched flight cut through the center of this section, unlabeled here) — consistent with ST1 being the small threshold/bench-step feature near the entry, not the main stair.

Roof structure levels +6.95 (ระดับหลังเสาล่าง) and +7.85 (ระดับหลังเสาบน) appear here — internal roof-post/ridge reference levels above the +6.65 wall-top roof-beam line; read faithfully as printed but not independently reconciled against roof slope geometry.
Roof framing itself is deferred to the structural drawings (outside this extraction's architecture-only page range 03-29).
